form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 32 days. Last run won by 0.8 len Kempton Park on March 14 over 4200m defeating Turndlightsdownlow carrying 69kg at $15 in a hurdle. The run before pulled up at Doncaster in the G2 River Don Novices' Hurdle on January 24 over 4900m. Found his best form now. Only needs to jump well to be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 46 day letup. Last start pulled up at Kelso in the G2 Premier Kelso Novices’ Hurdle on February 28 over 3600m. The run before won by 6 len Newcastle on January 27 over 4100m slow going defeating Eagles Reprieve carrying 75.5kg at $2.20 in a hurdle. Gets a chance to win. Pulled up last time out in the G2 Premier Kelso Novices’ Hurdle (3600m).

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Freshened for 60 days. Last outing sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished fourth of 9 runners at this track in the G2 Prestige Novices' Hurdle on February 14 over 4900m, 12 len behind Dalston Lad with 71kg at $10. The run before won by 1.0 len Fontwell Park on January 11 over 3800m on rain affected going defeating Manigod with 74.5kg at $3 in a hurdle. That run followed a win in a hurdle (3800m) at Fontwell Park two starts back.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign winning a big 4.5 len win. Doncaster November 28 over 4200m defeating Dalston Lad with 71.5kg at $5. First up last campaign 3 of 15 starters at Chepstow October 10 over 3200m, 2.5 len behind Frontier Prince carrying 70kg at $6. Genuine jumper with two wins to his name from six starts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered after jumping the third last hurdle.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation 2 of 15 starters at Kempton Park February 2 over 4200m, 15 len behind Reckless Spending carrying 72kg at $23. At debut 6 of 12 starters at Newbury November 6 over 3270m, 19 len behind Bass Hunter carrying 71kg at $5.50. Worth including.
